title: Dadagiri
subTitle: Barkha, a young heiress, is abused by her uncle and his family for her inheritance. Later, she runs away but is captured and taken back to her abusive relatives by her mother's ex-lover, Dharma.

title: Deewaangee
subTitle: Shekhar's pursuit of easy wealth puts his family in peril when they're taken hostage as a fallout from his ill-fated choices.

title: Hum Paanch
subTitle: Thakur Vir Pratap Singh, a landlord, rules over a town with an iron fist and crushes anybody who opposes him. However, unable to put up with his atrocities, five men join hands to destroy him.

title: Chehre Pe Chehra
subTitle: Dr Wilson, a scientist, develops a theory about humans having an angelic and a demonic side. He conducts an experiment on himself to prove it, but it goes terribly wrong, leading to dire consequences.

title: Agent Vinod
subTitle: On a mission to decipher a colleague's dying message, RAW agent Vinod travels across different countries and uncovers a dangerous conspiracy against India.

title: Hamara Khandan
subTitle: Vishal, who hails from a wealthy Hindu family, falls in love with Ruby, a poor Catholic girl. While her father approves of the marriage, his father does his best to stop them from marrying.

title: Adalat
subTitle: Dharma leaves his village and moves to Mumbai to lead a better life. However, things take an ugly turn when the police suspects his connection in a criminal case and arrests him.

title: Jaag Utha Insan
subTitle: Mahant Chaturvedi did not approve of his daughter marrying outside of their caste to Gopi, and as such breaks off all relations with them. Years later, Gopi attempts to make amends by bringing his group.

title: Kohram
subTitle: When a teacher is killed by two village tyrants, Thakur and Kalia, his brother Arjun swears to avenge him. Years later, Arjun kills Thakur and then joins forces with his brother's sons to face Kalia.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Dil Deke Dekho
subTitle: Three young men attempt to win the heart of an heiress, but trouble arises when she chooses the one hiding his true identity.

title: Daag
subTitle: When an unfortunate turn of events lines up, a newly-married couple's romantic outing is short-lived owing to a deadly fight.

title: Dastaan-E-Rafi
subTitle: Renowned celebrities discuss the life journey of gifted singer Mohammed Rafi, sharing moments and incidents they experienced with him during his career.

title: Naqab
subTitle: Imran, a freelance photographer, meets Asiya, a mysterious woman, on his way to Alipur for an assignment. However, things take a turn when he repeatedly sees her and starts to question reality.

title: Kanyadaan
subTitle: Rekha and Amar are married off in their childhood. Years later, Rekha learns about Amar's wedding to Lata and Kumar's real identity.

title: Sharmeelee
subTitle: A man meets a girl at a rest house and falls in love with her. However, on the day of their marriage, he is shocked to be betrothed to her twin sister.

title: Baseraa
subTitle: After 14 years in an asylum, Sharada returns, shaking Nima and Balraj's life. Past secrets resurface, complicating relationships and disrupting the fragile balance of their marriage.

title: Paappi Devataa
subTitle: Ram and Rahim become best friends after the latter offers shelter to Ram when he comes to Bombay. However, Ram is unaware that Rahim is involved in illegal activities.

title: Gautam Govinda
subTitle: Gautam, a dedicated officer, is transferred to a town that is teeming with criminals and ruled by Dharamdutt. In order to tackle Gautam, Dharamdutt sends his most able and trusted man, Govinda.

title: Gautam Govinda
subTitle: Gautam, a dedicated officer, is transferred to a town that is teeming with criminals and ruled by Dharamdutt. In order to tackle Gautam, Dharamdutt sends his most able and trusted man, Govinda.

title: Aakhri Daao
subTitle: Ravi, a burglar, leaves his life of crime behind and starts afresh winning the trust and respect of the local community. His life takes a turn when his former crime partner approaches him with a job.

title: Madhosh
subTitle: Young Raya and Soni fall deeply in love and secretly marry against their families' wishes. However, as time passes, Raya begins to struggle with the challenges of life and starts mistreating Soni.
